name: pricing
title: Pricing
description: Pricing page with plan cards, features showcase, testimonials, and static content data files.

files.content:
import type { Testimonial } from "@/types/testimonial";

export const content: Testimonial[] = [

    name: "Sarah Chen",

    role: "Tech Lead",
    company: "Acme Inc",

    featured: false,

    testimonial:
      "Best starter kit I've ever used. The documentation is clear and the code is clean.",

    verified: true,
    featured: false,

];

))}

docs: Pricing page with plan cards and feature comparison. Customize plans in `content/pricing/pricing-content.ts`, features in `content/features/features-content.ts`, and testimonials in `content/testimonials/testimonials-content.ts`.
